name: desktop
description: Nexus Tauri v2 desktop shell — wraps the apps/web dist (macOS-first, unsigned dev build).
author: 42ch
_p1_runtime_deps_note: V1.66 has no desktop-owned JS runtime dependencies. The Tauri webview loads apps/web/dist, which detects desktop mode at runtime via window.__TAURI_INTERNALS__ and invokes custom commands through window.__TAURI__.core.invoke. Transport primitives (opener, shell sidecar) live in the Rust crate, not in npm packages. apps/web remains a shared browser+desktop bundle with no Tauri npm deps.
